headline: Jensen Huang-Led Nvidia Honors Pioneering Women In Science With AI Chip Names: Here's The Legacy Behind Ada, Hopper And Rubin Architectures
summary: Nvidia has honored pioneering women in science—Ada Lovelace, Grace Hopper, and Vera Rubin—by naming its powerful AI chip architectures after them, spotlighting their lasting impact on computing, programming, and astrophysics.
